body_txt: Symmetry has often been considered a crucial element of beauty and form. So when a character designer wants to go for something bizarre, distorted, gritty, or badass, they will mess with the symmetry and one of the most common forms of Fashionable Asymmetry is to make one arm much bigger than the other. It will still be an arm with a hand and digits, but it will dominate the upper body and the size may be explained by some large glove-like piece of equipment or weapon . The creators may also decide whether or not to have the arm's considerable weight imbalance be acknowledged with the character walking with a slight shuffle or lean. If the fandom has dirty minds or if the work deals with lewd subject matter, expect them to immediately go for the Obligatory Joke about how only one of their arms managed to get so huge . Contrast with Red Right Hand , which, funnily enough, doesn't have to be a hand and is any mutation or defect used to denote an evil side. Not to be confused with The Left Hand of Darkness . Compare and contrast Asymmetrically Jacked .
